headline: Franklin's March AUM Declines 3.1% Sequentially Despite Net Inflows
summary: BEN's AUM slipped 3.1% in March to $1.68T as market weakness offset $5B inflows, with declines across most asset classes.

raw.headline: Franklin's March AUM Declines 3.1% Sequentially Despite Net Inflows
raw.summary: BEN's AUM slipped 3.1% in March to $1.68T as market weakness offset $5B inflows, with declines across most asset classes.

headline: T. ROWE PRICE COLLEGE SAVINGS PLAN BECOMES "T. ROWE PRICE 529" TO REFLECT EXPANDED FLEXIBILITY FOR EDUCATION EXPENSES
summary: T. Rowe Price, a global asset management firm and a leader in retirement, today announced the renaming of its longstanding "T. Rowe Price College Savings Plan" to "T. Rowe Price 529." The name change to the firm's Morningstar Gold-rated national plani was made to more accurately reflect the growing range of educational expenses these tax-advantaged accounts can support.
